data_in.description: CSV or Excel file with required chemical structure descriptors for molecules

data_out.description: CSV file with per-molecule binary bitter/not-bitter predictions

domain_knowledge: BitterPredict requires specific molecular descriptors as input; the descriptor set must match those used during model training for valid predictions.
Binary predictions represent discrete classes (bitter vs. non-bitter) with no confidence scores or probability outputs reported in the classifier's standard output.
Input format flexibility (CSV or Excel) allows integration with diverse upstream cheminformatics pipelines; descriptor columns must be named and ordered consistently.
The classifier operates on calculated molecular properties rather than raw chemical structure files (SMILES, MOL, SDF), requiring prior descriptor computation by cheminformatics software.

direct_checks: verify that github:Niv-Lab__BitterPredict1 repository is accessible and contains BitterPredict.m file
script_runs: BitterPredict.m executes without error when provided a valid CSV or Excel input file containing required molecular descriptors

output_matches_reference: per-molecule predictions (binary bitter/not-bitter labels) are produced for all input molecules; no canonical answer for prediction values themselves without reference dataset, but output structure must be complete and non-null for all rows
expert_review: verify that the descriptor columns present in the input file match those documented as 'required' by BitterPredict.m (descriptor names and roles are domain-specific chemical/computational knowledge)
assess whether the binary predictions are internally consistent with the classifier's decision logic as documented in the repository README or code comments

task_description: Run the BitterPredict classifier on a CSV or Excel file containing molecular descriptors to generate per-molecule binary bitter/not-bitter predictions. Output predictions as a CSV file with molecule identifiers and predicted class labels.

task_inputs.label: CSV or Excel file with chemical structure descriptors

task_objective: Execute BitterPredict.m on a CSV or Excel file of molecular descriptors and generate binary bitter/not-bitter predictions for each compound.
title: Reproduce BitterPredict classifier predictions on a set of molecules with known chemical structure descriptors
uncertainty_notes: This card was generated by the LLM-assisted pipeline and needs scientific expert review.

workflow_description: 1. Load input CSV or Excel file containing molecular descriptors for a set of molecules. 2. Execute BitterPredict.m classifier on the loaded descriptor data. 3. Generate binary predictions (bitter or not-bitter) for each molecule. 4. Compile predictions into output CSV file with molecule identifiers and predicted class labels.
